'''Reya''' was as a [[Gender|male]] [[Neimoidian]] [[baron]] of [[Cato Neimoidia]] in the decades following the [[Battle of Endor]]. A member of [[House Reya]], he attempted to do business with [[Leia Skywalker Organa Solo|Leia Organa]], the leader of the [[Resistance]].<ref name="PD 21" /> However, this was in reality a [[Mission to Cato Neimoidia (Resistance)|ploy]] on the Resistance's part in order to free [[Lor San Tekka]], who had been captured in [[Baron]] [[Paw Maccon]]'s [[Great Vaults of Cato Neimoidia|vault]].<ref name="Poe Dameron 22">[[Poe Dameron 22|''Poe Dameron'' 22]]</ref>
